title: clinelymus cylindricus
intro: Clinelymus cylindricus, also known as Six-angled Pyrethrum, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Clinelymus cylindricus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
